TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Alapawan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Hikasiki go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 517 buwan, 1,430 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 64% kyan ku 915 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 36% kyan ku 515 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 62%, Puyuma 0.5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.5%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Alapawan hya' ga Asiroay . tay mkyahu' na Alapawan hya' ga Fafokod. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč alapawan …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu ńßikas~…ēiki …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *,*** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, pujuma *.*%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *.*%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na alapawan ńßja Ē …£a as~…ēiroaj . taj mkjańßu Ē na alapawan ńßja Ē …£a *a*oko*. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. ńßas~…ēis~…ējo maki * ńßas~…ēis~…ējo. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Alapawan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Hikasiki go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 517 buwan, 1,430 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 64% kyan ku 915 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 36% kyan ku 515 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 62%, Puyuma 0.5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.5%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Alapawan hya' ga Asiroay . tay mkyahu' na Alapawan hya' ga Fafokod. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč alapawan …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu ńßikas~…ēiki …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *,*** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, pujuma *.*%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *.*%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na alapawan ńßja Ē …£a as~…ēiroaj . taj mkjańßu Ē na alapawan ńßja Ē …£a *a*oko*. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. ńßas~…ēis~…ējo maki * ńßas~…ēis~…ējo. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
